component.name: sunxi-tools
component.summary: Tools for working with Allwinner (sunxi) ARM processors

description.p: This package contains various tools for working with devices based around the Allwinner sunxi processors (A10/A13/A20/A31 etc). Utilities include tools to:

ul.li: interact with the processors' lowlevel bootrom (AKA FEL mode).
boot over the USB OTG port.
compile and decompile the Allwinner binary hardware descriptions (FEX files).
display information about sunxi boot headers.
